column1: # Sweep 18 — Architecture probes on locked config (2026-04-20)
# First test of arch variables on Spark SOTA 11L U-Net (SP8192).
# Nano is probing these too but at 4,400 tok/s (~30 min/run). Spark does this in ~8 min.
# Params under test (all defaults from SOTA script):
#   NUM_LOOPS: default=2. Test 3 — adds one extra loop of recurrent layers.
#   LOOP_START/LOOP_END: default=3,5 (3 layers recur). Test 2,6 — 5 layers recur.
#   PARALLEL_RESIDUAL_START: default=7. Test 5 — parallel path starts 2 layers earlier.
# All use full locked config + default MATRIX_LR=0.022 (sweep_17 still running).
# After MATRIX_LR is locked, re-run best arch config with updated LR if needed.
